tagline: Quiet luxury for hands and feet.

hero.heading: Nails styled like a couture editorial.
hero.subheading: A tiny, intentional Glendale studio for gel, structured manicures, and bespoke art. Seventy-one five-star reviews and counting.

about.heading: Small studio. Big standards.
paragraphs: Stellusik is a one-chair-at-a-time nail studio — no walk-ins, no overbooking, no cheap polish. Every service is shaped to your hand, your lifestyle, and the look you've been saving on Instagram.
Our clients keep coming back because the work lasts: structured gel that doesn't lift, art that doesn't flake, finishes that look brand-new at three weeks.

services.title: Signature Gel Manicure
services.description: Structured gel overlay, mirror-smooth finish, your choice of color from our editorial palette.

services.title: Builder Gel Extensions
services.description: Soft-square, almond, or coffin — sculpted on your natural nail with builder gel, no acrylic.

services.title: Bespoke Nail Art
services.description: Hand-painted designs, chrome, ombré, French variations. Brought in a screenshot? Even better.

services.title: Russian Pedicure
services.description: Dry, e-file based pedicure with a true cuticle reset. The smoothest feet you'll wear all season.

services.title: Soak-off & Reset
services.description: Gentle gel removal, nail strengthening treatment, prep for your next look.

services.title: Lash Lift & Tint
services.description: Add-on service for clients who like to leave the chair fully styled. By appointment only.

reviews.name: Lara K.
reviews.text: I've gone every three weeks for almost two years. Best gel application in Glendale — period.

reviews.name: Maya H.
reviews.text: Booked builder gel and a custom design for my wedding. She nailed (sorry) exactly the moodboard I sent.

reviews.name: Sara T.
reviews.text: Worth every dollar. Quiet, clean, calm — and the work holds up perfectly.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: StellusikNail, 1010 N Glendale Ave #205, Glendale, CA 91206

seo.title: StellusikNail — Couture Nail Studio in Glendale
seo.description: Editorial nail studio in Glendale, CA. Structured gel, builder gel extensions, bespoke art, and Russian pedicures. 5-star rated, by appointment.
